title: prd-os codebase map
description: Snapshot of a repo's structure, stack, and entry points. Built by prd_map_runner.py and consumed by PRD planning/review commands so a PRD author is not writing blind. Facts only; no pattern distillation in this schema version.

built_at.description: UTC iso8601 timestamp when this map was generated.

git_sha.description: HEAD commit sha at build time, null if not a git repo.

repo_root.description: Absolute path to the repo root at build time. For informational use; do not consume as a hard dependency.

languages.description: Detected source languages with file counts. Keys are lowercase language names.

package_manifests.description: Paths to detected package manifests, relative to repo_root.

test_framework.description: Detected primary test framework (pytest, jest, vitest, cargo, etc.), null if not detected.

lint_configs.description: Paths to detected lint/format configs, relative to repo_root.

entry_points.description: Paths to likely program entry points (main.py, index.ts, server entrypoints, CLI scripts declared in manifests).

directory_tree.description: Top-level source directories with file counts. Sorted by file count descending. Excludes build artifacts and dependency caches.

notable_files.description: Presence flags for files that meaningfully shape the project. Booleans only; never contents.

env_files_present.description: Names of .env / dotenv files found (e.g. .env, .env.example). Names only, never contents.

todo_count.description: Total TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX comments found in tracked source directories.

total_loc.description: Approximate total lines of code across detected source files.

ignored_paths.description: Path globs excluded during the scan. Documented for reproducibility.
